dspPicker.noneSelected: No DSPs assigned — this user won't see any WOs

users.noneWontSeeWOs: None — user won't see any WOs

inviteModal.title: Invite User
inviteModal.subtitle: They'll receive an email to set their password
inviteModal.rolesHintVendor: Only vendor roles are available — you can't grant DSP or platform roles from here.
inviteModal.rolesHintDsp: Only DSP roles are available for your organization.
inviteModal.dspAssignmentsHint: Choose which DSPs this user will handle. They'll only see WOs and vehicles from the DSPs selected here.

invitations.heading: Invitations
invitations.subtitleSiteAdmin: Invite new DSP owners, vendors, or technicians. They get an email with a one-click link to set up their account. If SMTP isn't configured yet, copy the invite link manually from the row below.
invitations.subtitleVendor: Invite new admins or technicians for your shop. They get an email with a one-click link to set up their account. If SMTP isn't configured yet, copy the invite link manually from the row below.
invitations.subtitleDsp: Invite new co-owners for your DSP. They get an email with a one-click link to set up their account. If SMTP isn't configured yet, copy the invite link manually from the row below.
invitations.confirmRevokeFmt: Revoke invitation for {{email}}? They will not be able to use the link.

roleDescriptions.dsp_owner: Full admin: billing, users, fleet, inspections, work orders.
roleDescriptions.dsp_manager: Manages fleet + WOs. Cannot manage users or billing.
roleDescriptions.dsp_inspector: Runs DVIC inspections + reports defects. Read-only on WOs.
roleDescriptions.vendor_admin: Full admin: billing, users, WO acceptance, technician assignment.
roleDescriptions.service_writer: Receives WOs, assigns technicians, talks with the DSP.
roleDescriptions.technician: Picks up assigned WOs, marks progress, completes work.
roleDescriptions.site_admin: Nova Fora team — full system access.

createInvitationModal.title: New invitation
createInvitationModal.noPermission: Your role doesn't have permission to invite anyone.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Use at least 12 characters, mix of letters and numbers

twoFA.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFA.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security with TOTP (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password)

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account
sessions.signOutAllOthers: Sign out of all other devices

setup2FA.title: Enable 2FA
setup2FA.step1Intro: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the secret key manually.
setup2FA.manualKeyHint: Or enter this secret key manually:
setup2FA.step2Intro: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app:

businessDetails.title: Business details
businessDetails.subtitle: Shown to partners and on invoices

smsOptIn.title: Inspection Impossible SMS
smsOptIn.subtitle: Notify via SMS when an inspector cannot complete an inspection (keys missing, vehicle not found, etc.)

eveningReminder.title: Set evening reminder text for keys and/or scheduled repairs
eveningReminder.warning: Vendors will not dispatch without confirmation of readiness

keyReturn.title: Key(s) return time, location, lockbox code, etc.
keyReturn.subtitle: Shared with vendors so drivers know where to drop keys after overnight repairs
keyReturn.placeholder: e.g. Front office lockbox, code 4827. Drop keys in the blue bin after hours.

preferredVendors.title: Preferred Vendors (AMR, Body, Detailing, and Flex Fleet)
preferredVendors.subtitle: Auto-route work orders to your preferred vendor for each category

slack.title: Slack Integration
slack.subtitle: Mirror priority alerts (Rush Orders, Grounded Vehicles, Completions) into a Slack channel

vendorServices.title: Services offered
vendorServices.subtitle: DSPs match to vendors based on these capabilities

dvicCatalog.title: Defect Catalog
dvicCatalog.subtitlePart1: Items the inspector checks for this vehicle template. Amazon rules cannot be modified; add your own custom items with
dvicCatalog.noDefects: No defects configured for this template.
dvicCatalog.controlHintMid1: text for custom items, plus the
dvicCatalog.controlHintMid2: (which catalog rule it maps to). Your DFS Account Manager curates

addCustomDefect.title: Add Custom Defect
addCustomDefect.subtitle: DSP-source rule, persisted to the V2.2 catalog
addCustomDefect.infoBanner: The new rule references an existing (part, defect_type) tuple from the V2.2 catalog so it inherits the validation and routing wiring. Tick "Show in wizard" if inspectors should see it during walkarounds.
addCustomDefect.defectTypeHint: Backend rejects (part, defect_type) pairs that aren't in the V2.2 catalog.
addCustomDefect.defectTextPlaceholder: What the inspector sees on the form — verbatim.
addCustomDefect.showInWizardHint: Adds this rule as a checklist item the inspector sees during walkarounds. Off if the rule is admin-only / for reporting.
addCustomDefect.wizardCategoryHint: Header label inside the section the inspector sees.
addCustomDefect.photoRequired: Photo required (off for sensory defects: odor, brake noise, etc.)
addCustomDefect.brandedOnly: Branded only (Amazon DOT / Prime decals — hides for Owner/Rental vans)

explanation.title: Defect Auto-Approval Rules
explanation.bodyPart1: Normally, every reported defect requires your manual approval before a work order is created.
explanation.bodyPart2: Auto-approval rules let you skip that step
explanation.bodyPart3: for routine, low-risk categories so vendors can start working immediately.

presets.title: Quick presets
presets.subtitle: — click to apply, then fine-tune below
presets.conservativeDesc: Lowest-risk scope — only Amazon-managed fleet, safe categories
presets.balancedDesc: Everything your primary AMR vendor covers — routine maintenance auto-approved
presets.comprehensiveDesc: Broadest reach — everything except heavy body and windshield work

globalCap.title: Global cost cap
globalCap.subtitle: Any repair estimate above this value still requires manual approval, regardless of category rules.

notify.title: Notify me on auto-approvals
notify.subtitle: Send a notification whenever an auto-approval fires so you have full visibility, even without needing to click approve.

editUserModal.title: Edit User
editUserModal.rolesHintVendor: Only vendor roles are available — you can't grant DSP or platform roles from here.
editUserModal.rolesHintDsp: Only DSP roles are available for your organization.
editUserModal.dspAssignmentsHint: Pick which DSPs this user will handle. Each user only sees WOs and vehicles from the assigned DSPs.
editUserModal.twoFADisabled: Not enabled — user can enable in Security
editUserModal.confirmRemoveBody: User will lose all access immediately. Historical actions are kept.
